# volcenginecc_dns_backup_schedule (Resource)

Domain backup plan configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "volcenginecc_dns_backup_schedule" "DNSBackupScheduleDemo" {
  zid      = "2xxxx71"
  schedule = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `schedule` (Number) Backup plan:   - 0: Disable automatic backup.   - 1: Automatically back up every hour.   - 2: Automatically back up every day.   - 3: Automatically back up every month.
- `zid` (String) You need to obtain the ID of the domain name for the backup plan. You can call the ListZones API to get the domain name ID.

### Read-Only

- `count_limit` (Number) Backup quantity limit.
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import volcenginecc_dns_backup_schedule.example "zid"
```
